EmailTemplate.name: NOC Generation
EmailTemplate.subject: NOC Generated
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Loan__c.RW_Booking__r.Unit_No__r.Relationship_Manager__r.RM_Name__c},
This is to notify that NOC for the Loan {!Loan__c.Name} for the Customer - {!Loan__c.RW_Booking__r.Primary_Applicant_Name__c} has been generated for the Booking {!Loan__c.RW_Booking__r.Name} of the Unit Number {!Loan__c.RW_Unit_No__r.Name}.
Thanks,
Runwal Team
